wordplay_note: Communist sympathizer whose subjective world is a collectivist utopia
card_description: Joan Simpson is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Eye in the Sky*. One of the eight people trapped in layered subjective realities. Name note: Communist sympathizer whose subjective world is a collectivist utopia. Political ideology as personal cosmology. First appears in *Eye in the Sky*.

reference.brief: One of the eight people trapped in layered subjective realities
